notes: Subsection (a). Of the $3,203,262,000 for FEMA Federal Assistance (SEC. 1701(4)), $115M shall be derived by transfer from unobligated balances in paragraph (2) of the FEMA Federal Assistance heading in Title V of Division J of the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (P.L. 117-58).

provisions.description: Extends the National Flood Insurance Program by applying sections 1309(a) and 1319 of the National Flood Insurance Act of 1968 with the date specified in section 1106 of this Act substituted for 'September 30, 2023'. Includes retroactive effective date if enacted after March 14, 2025.

provisions.raw_text: SEC. 1709. (a) Sections 1309(a) and 1319 of the National Flood Insurance Act of 1968 (42 U.S.C. 4016(a) and 4026) shall be applied by substituting the
notes: Subsection (a) extends NFIP authorization by substituting the CR end date (from section 1106) for September 30, 2023.
Subsection (b) provides that this section becomes effective immediately, but if enacted after March 14, 2025, it applies retroactively as if in effect on that date.
This addresses potential NFIP lapse between prior authorization expiration and enactment.
